metadata.title: Beyond Gluten | Integrated Gluten-Free Platform
metadata.description: The first platform in the Arab world combining safe shopping, a supportive community, and medically approved awareness content for celiac patients. Join now for free!
metadata.keywords: gluten-free platform, gluten-free shopping, celiac community, certified gluten-free products, beyond gluten home

openGraph.title: Beyond Gluten - Shop, Connect, and Learn with Confidence
openGraph.description: The first integrated platform for gluten-free products and services in the Arab world

hero.title: Live <green>Beyond Gluten</green>. Live Limitlessly.
hero.subtitle: Your all-in-one companion for a safe gluten-free life. Discover trusted places, safe products, expert support, and everyday peace of mind.

items.title: 100% Gluten-Free
items.description: Certified gluten-free products you can trust.

items.title: Premium Ingredients
items.description: Only the finest, natural ingredients go into our products.

items.title: Made with Care
items.description: Every item is crafted with attention to detail and love.

leftItems.title: Gluten-Free Restaurant Guide
leftItems.description: Find trusted gluten-free restaurants with safety ratings and real reviews.

leftItems.title: Certified Gluten-Free Products
leftItems.description: Explore gluten-free products, vitamins, and supplements.

leftItems.title: Expert Consultations & Family Support
leftItems.description: Get expert guidance for daily gluten-free living and safe travel.

rightItems.title: Medication Safety Scanner
rightItems.description: Scan or search medications to check if they are gluten-free.

rightItems.title: Smart Gluten-Free Vending Machines
rightItems.description: Locate gluten-free vending machines and purchase products directly from the app.

rightItems.title: Gluten-Free Establishment Accreditation System
rightItems.description: Discover certified gluten-free restaurants, schools, and facilities.

innovativeShop.title: An Innovative Way to Shop
innovativeShop.description: When you join <bold>Beyond Gluten</bold>, you'll enjoy a massive, upgraded shopping method through our multi-virtual experience.

reviews.text: Love the app!! Looking forward to more of my favorite stores being added so I can use it more. The interface is incredibly intuitive and the gluten-free verification gives me peace of mind every time I shop.
reviews.name: Jamal Ahmed

reviews.text: This app has completely changed how I manage my gluten sensitivity. The restaurant scanner and safety check features give me real peace of mind when dining out with family or traveling abroad. Highly recommend!
reviews.name: Sarah Jenkins

reviews.text: The medication scanner feature is revolutionary! I can finally check if my prescriptions are gluten-free without calling the pharmacy. The community support is amazing too.
reviews.name: Michael Chen

contactUs.title: Get In Touch With Us!
